info.title: Hermes Studio API
info.description: Hermes Studio API — chat sessions, scheduled jobs, platform channels, model management, skills, memory, logs, file browser, group chat, and terminal.

tags.name: Chat Run
tags.description: Chat run HTTP and Socket.IO bridge operations

tags.name: Runtime Versions
tags.description: Runtime and Web UI version management

tags.name: Devices
tags.description: Device pairing and LAN peer operations

tags.name: Coding Agents
tags.description: Coding agent installation, config, and runs

post.summary: Run chat and wait for completion
post.description: Starts a Hermes Studio chat run through the chat-run transport and waits for a terminal result. Use this from HTTP/MCP callers that cannot consume Socket.IO streams.

input.description: User message text or content blocks.

session_id.description: Optional session id. Omit this to create a new session automatically. Provide an existing session id to continue that session.

profile.description: Hermes Studio profile name. Defaults to the authenticated request profile or default.

provider.description: Model provider key to use for this run, for example openai, anthropic, deepseek, or a configured custom provider key.

model.description: Model id to use for this run, for example gpt-5.1 or deepseek-v4-pro.

source.description: Run backend source. Use cli for Hermes bridge runs, coding_agent for Claude Code/Codex, or global_agent for global-agent sessions. Omit source for normal Hermes chat runs; do not use the legacy api_server source.

session_source.description: Marks a coding-agent or bridge session as launched from the global agent.

instructions.description: Optional extra run instructions appended after the system prompt.

workspace.description: Optional current working directory for the run.

coding_agent_id.description: Coding agent id when source is coding_agent.

baseUrl.description: Optional provider base URL for coding-agent runs.

apiKey.description: Optional provider API key for coding-agent runs.

apiMode.description: Optional provider wire API mode for coding-agent runs.

timeout_ms.description: Maximum time to wait for run.completed or run.failed.

include_events.description: Include recorded run events in the HTTP response.

get.description: Establish a WebSocket connection for interactive terminal access. Uses the `ws` or `wss` protocol with `?token=` for authentication.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token
